title: Slack
description: Slack channels + outbound-routing allowlists used by the curator. Allowlists are an intentional security model: the curator never posts to channels or DMs not explicitly listed here.

allowed_channels.description: Channel IDs the curator is permitted to post in. Posts to unlisted channels are silently dropped.

allowed_dm_users.description: User keys (resolving via users.json to slack_user_id) the curator is permitted to DM.

summary_channel.description: Optional: channel ID where the Slack bridge (bridges/slack/bridge.py) posts the daily HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW summary. Must also appear in allowed_channels.

workspace_slug.description: Optional: Linear workspace slug used by the Slack bridge to build clickable <https://linear.app/{slug}/issue/{id}|{id}> URLs. Omit to fall back to bare issue IDs.

fallback_dm_user.description: Optional: user key (from users.json) the Slack bridge DMs when an issue has no assignee or the assignee isn't in allowed_dm_users. Defaults to the first entry of allowed_dm_users.
